'''鈭歞-sh-l-s''' ('''kadashlesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:electroejaculate|electroejaculate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-sh-l-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:electroejaculate|electroejaculate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-sh-l-s
|-
! Lemma
| kadashlesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidashlesoko|thidashlesoko]] || [[word:jidashlesoko|jidashlesoko]] || [[word:shidashlesoko|shidashlesoko]] || [[word:kidashlesoko|kidashlesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudashlesoko|thuthudashlesoko]] || [[word:jujudashlesoko|jujudashlesoko]] || [[word:shushudashlesoko|shushudashlesoko]] || [[word:kukudashlesoko|kukudashlesoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dashlesoko|th忙dashlesoko]] || [[word:j忙dashlesoko|j忙dashlesoko]] || [[word:sh忙dashlesoko|sh忙dashlesoko]] || [[word:k忙dashlesoko|k忙dashlesoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadashlesoko|thadashlesoko]] || [[word:jadashlesoko|jadashlesoko]] || [[word:shadashlesoko|shadashlesoko]] || [[word:kadashlesoko|kadashlesoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
